hallucination.rationale: The generated output is only a thinking/planning process and does not contain a final clinical note with any fabricated content. There is no hallucinated clinical content since no actual note was produced.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is entirely a thinking/reasoning process and does not produce a completed clinical note. The instructions required returning ONLY the completed note, and instead the output is an endless loop of self-correction that never produces a final document.

completeness.rationale: No clinical note was generated, so none of the transcript content was captured in a final output.

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was produced. The output is entirely unstructured reasoning/thinking text with no template sections.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was attempted since no clinical note was generated.

duplication.rationale: The thinking process contains massive repetitive duplication of the same self-correction statement ('I need to ensure I do not include the square brackets/parentheses in the output') repeated hundreds of times.
